description: Style NoteA grey top with a sheen creates the perfect eveningwear look. The beaded detail at the collar adds sophisticated styling while the bow at the back keeps you looking feminine. This vero moda top can be worn with shorts or skinny denims on a special evening out. Product DetailsGrey sleeveless woven top, has a high collar halter neckline with beaded detail on it, the high collar has a buttoned closure with tie detail at the back of the neck, a key hole detail under it and gathers in the front from under the collar Material and Care100% polyesterHand washDo not bleach or tumble dry Use cool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
